name: @once-ui-system/core
format: props are 'type', 'type = default', or '!type' (required). Components with 'mixins' also accept all props of those mixins. 'extends' means all props of that component are accepted.

props.play: { auto?: boolean; interval?: number; controls?: boolean; progress?: boolean; } = { auto: false, interval: 3000, controls: true }

props.shine: { opacity?: number; filter?: string; blending?: CSSProperties["mixBlendMode"]; mask?: MaskOptions; }
props.burn: { opacity?: number; filter?: string; blending?: CSSProperties["mixBlendMode"]; mask?: MaskOptions; }
props.texture: { opacity?: number; filter?: string; blending?: CSSProperties["mixBlendMode"]; image?: string; mask?: MaskOptions; }

props.data: !{ headers: { content: ReactNode; key: string; sortable?: boolean; }[]; rows: ReactNode[][]; }

props.toasts: !{ id: string; variant: "success" | "danger" | "warning" | "info"; message: React.ReactNode; action?: React.ReactNode; }[]

props.emptyState: React.ReactNode = No data available for the selected period
props.errorState: React.ReactNode = An error occurred while fetching data

props.line: { count?: number; width?: number; length?: number; }
{ count?: number; width?: number; length?: number; }

props.title: !string
props.author: { name: string; url?: string; image?: string; }
